metrics.liveHint: Recent projects still being progressed in the background by the auto-director or auto-execution.
metrics.actionHint: Recent projects waiting for review, failed, or cancelled and needing your next decision.
metrics.readyHint: Recent projects that have reached the writing-ready stage and can move into chapter execution.
metrics.failedHint: Total failed tasks from the Task Center; handle them in a batch later.

recommend.titleHasNovels: Want to start the next book quickly? Hand it to the AI auto-director.
recommend.titleEmpty: First time here? Let the AI auto-director start a book with you.
recommend.description: Give it a rough idea and the AI will draft directions, a title pack, and the launch prep, pausing for your confirmation at key stages — no need to figure out the whole structure up front.
recommend.hintA: Great when genre, hook, and the first-30-chapter promise are not yet clear
recommend.hintB: Also great for quickly scaffolding a new project you can keep building on

continueRecent.title: Resume recent project
continueRecent.description: The home page should take you straight back to the book most worth continuing.
continueRecent.errorMessage: Can't read the project list right now, so the home page can't recommend a next step.
continueRecent.emptyMessage: You haven't started a novel project yet. For your first run we recommend going straight through the AI auto-director — it'll set up direction and writing prep for you.

novelLead.worldBound: This project is bound to world "{{world}}" — continue writing right away.
novelLead.noDescription: This project has no summary yet — jump into the editor to keep going.

actions.continueAutoExecuteFailed: Failed to resume auto-execution of the current chapter range.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Common entry points and the easiest launch options for newcomers.

recent.title: Recent projects
recent.description: More than titles — current stage and recovery entry are shown here too.
recent.errorMessage: Can't load recent projects right now; try again later.
recent.emptyMessage: No novel projects yet — start from "Create novel".
